question: what is the total sales order value
business_context: total sales order value from ORDR represents committed sales amount
embedding_text: total sales order value total so amount sales commitment ordered value sum orders
sql: SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_sales_order_value" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: how many sales orders are open
business_context: open sales orders are ORDR rows where DocStatus is O and not cancelled
embedding_text: count open sales orders how many pending so open so pending orders
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "open_sales_order_count" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: which customers have the highest sales order value
business_context: group sales order committed value by customer from ORDR
embedding_text: top customers by sales order value customer wise so amount client spend ordered value ranking
sql: SELECT T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_order_value" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" ORDER BY "total_order_value" DESC LIMIT 10

question: show top sales orders
intent: rank sales order documents by value
business_context: retrieve individual ORDR sales order records ordered by document total
embedding_text: top sales orders highest sales order value biggest orders rank order documents order list top 5 orders
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", CAST(T0."DocTotal" AS DOUBLE) AS "DocTotal", T0."DocStatus" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T0."DocTotal" DESC LIMIT 10

question: show open sales orders for OPPO F27 PRO+ and iPhone 16 Pro Max
intent: open sales orders filtered by product names
business_context: product names are matched as text through sales order line description and item master item name; keep product names inside single quotes and use lower-case LIKE comparisons
embedding_text: open sales orders for product names item names OPPO F27 PRO iPhone 16 Pro Max mobile phone item description item master product name
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocDueDate", T1."ItemCode", T1."Dscription", T2."ItemName", CAST(T1."OpenQty" AS DOUBLE) AS "OpenQty", CAST(T1."Quantity" AS DOUBLE) AS "Quantity", CAST(T1."Price" AS DOUBLE) AS "Price", CAST(T1."LineTotal" AS DOUBLE) AS "LineTotal", T1."LineStatus" FROM ORDR T0 JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" LEFT JOIN OITM T2 ON T2."ItemCode" = T1."ItemCode" WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND T1."LineStatus" = 'O' AND (LOWER(IFNULL(T2."ItemName", '')) LIKE '%oppo f27 pro+%' OR LOWER(IFNULL(T1."Dscription", '')) LIKE '%oppo f27 pro+%' OR LOWER(IFNULL(T1."ItemCode", '')) LIKE '%oppo f27 pro+%' OR LOWER(IFNULL(T2."ItemName", '')) LIKE '%iphone 16 pro max%' OR LOWER(IFNULL(T1."Dscription", '')) LIKE '%iphone 16 pro max%' OR LOWER(IFNULL(T1."ItemCode", '')) LIKE '%iphone 16 pro max%') ORDER BY T0."DocDate" DESC, T0."DocNum" DESC LIMIT 50

question: Show me the top sales order with item-level quantity, price and delivery details
intent: top sales order item-level quantity price delivery details
business_context: find the highest value non-cancelled sales order and return its RDR1 line quantities, prices, line totals, delivery dates, warehouse, and line status
embedding_text: top sales order item level quantity price delivery details line items ship date warehouse highest value order
sql: SELECT T0."DocEntry", T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", CAST(T0."DocTotal" AS DOUBLE) AS "DocTotal", T1."LineNum", T1."ItemCode", T1."Dscription", CAST(T1."Quantity" AS DOUBLE) AS "Quantity", CAST(T1."Price" AS DOUBLE) AS "Price", CAST(T1."LineTotal" AS DOUBLE) AS "LineTotal", T1."ShipDate", T1."WhsCode", T1."LineStatus" FROM ORDR T0 JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND T0."DocEntry" = (SELECT T2."DocEntry" FROM ORDR T2 WHERE COALESCE(T2."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T2."DocTotal" DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY T1."LineNum" ASC

question: show overdue sales orders
business_context: overdue sales orders are open non-cancelled ORDR rows with DocDueDate before current date
embedding_text: overdue sales orders delayed so due date passed open orders customer delivery delay
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDueDate", CAST(T0."DocTotal" AS DOUBLE) AS "DocTotal" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND T0."DocDueDate" < CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY T0."DocDueDate" ASC LIMIT 10

question: which products have the most pending sales order quantity
business_context: pending sales quantity comes from RDR1 OpenQty for open sales order lines
embedding_text: top pending items sales order open quantity item wise pending so quantity not delivered
sql: SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", CAST(SUM(T0."OpenQty") AS DOUBLE) AS "pending_quantity" FROM RDR1 T0 JOIN ORDR T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" WHERE T1."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T1."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription" ORDER BY "pending_quantity" DESC LIMIT 10

question: what is the total AR invoice amount
business_context: AR invoice value from OINV represents actual sales revenue billed to customers
embedding_text: total ar invoice amount total sales invoice value customer bill revenue sum invoices
sql: SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_ar_invoice_amount" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: how much AR invoice balance is receivable
business_context: balance receivable is the uncollected revenue on OINV, derived as DocTotal minus PaidToDate
embedding_text: ar invoice balance receivable unpaid outstanding customer bills pending collection balance due
sql: SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) AS "total_balance_receivable" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: which customers have bought the most
business_context: group actual invoiced customer revenue by customer from OINV
embedding_text: top customers by ar invoice value customer wise invoice amount sales revenue ranking highest spending customers
sql: SELECT T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_invoice_value" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" ORDER BY "total_invoice_value" DESC LIMIT 10

question: which products are selling the most
business_context: top selling item quantity comes from INV1 quantity joined to OINV
embedding_text: top selling products best selling items highest revenue items item wise sales product ranking invoiced quantity
sql: SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", SUM(T0."Quantity") AS "sold_quantity", SUM(T0."LineTotal") AS "total_revenue" FROM INV1 T0 JOIN OINV T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" WHERE COALESCE(T1."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription" ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC LIMIT 10

question: how many sales orders today
business_context: count of ORDR rows with DocDate equal to current date
embedding_text: sales orders today today orders count today order volume daily orders
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "orders_today" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE T0."DocDate" = CURRENT_DATE AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: compare sales order value and AR invoice value
intent: compare committed sales order value with actual AR invoice value
business_context: sales orders are commitments from ORDR, AR invoices are actual customer billing from OINV
embedding_text: compare sales order value ar invoice value ordered vs invoiced commitment vs revenue
sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y') AS "total_sales_order_value", (SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y') AS "total_ar_invoice_value"

question: show latest sales orders
business_context: retrieve most recent ORDR records ordered by date
embedding_text: latest sales orders recent orders show orders list orders fetch orders display orders
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocStatus" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T0."DocDate" DESC LIMIT 10

question: show latest AR invoices
business_context: retrieve most recent OINV records ordered by date
embedding_text: latest ar invoices recent invoices show invoices list invoices fetch invoices sales invoices
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocStatus" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T0."DocDate" DESC LIMIT 10

question: show latest sales returns
business_context: retrieve most recent ORDN sales return records ordered by date
embedding_text: latest sales returns recent customer returns show returns list return documents
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocStatus" FROM ORDN T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T0."DocDate" DESC LIMIT 10

question: which products are returned the most
business_context: top returned items come from RDN1 quantity joined to ORDN
embedding_text: top returned products sales return items highest returned quantity item wise customer returns
sql: SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", SUM(T0."Quantity") AS "returned_quantity", SUM(T0."LineTotal") AS "total_return_value" FROM RDN1 T0 JOIN ORDN T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" WHERE COALESCE(T1."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription" ORDER BY "returned_quantity" DESC LIMIT 10

question: what is the total sales return value
business_context: total sales return value from ORDN represents customer returned sales amount
embedding_text: total sales return value total customer returns amount returned goods credit value
sql: SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_sales_return_value" FROM ORDN T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: fetch the AR invoice linked to sales order 504632
intent: find AR invoice created from a sales order
business_context: AR invoices created from sales orders are linked through invoice line BaseEntry and BaseType 17
embedding_text: ar invoice linked to sales order invoice from sales order base entry base type 17 related invoice fetch linked document
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2."DocEntry", T2."DocNum", T2."DocDate", T2."CardCode", T2."CardName", T2."DocTotal" FROM ORDR T0 JOIN INV1 T1 ON T1."BaseEntry" = T0."DocEntry" AND T1."BaseType" = 17 JOIN OINV T2 ON T2."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" WHERE T0."DocEntry" = 504632 LIMIT 10

question: show overdue AR invoices with unpaid balance
intent: overdue AR invoices with receivable balance
business_context: overdue AR invoices are open customer invoices where due date has passed and DocTotal minus PaidToDate remains positive
embedding_text: overdue ar invoices unpaid balance receivable outstanding customer invoices past due collections
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocDueDate", CAST(T0."DocTotal" AS DOUBLE) AS "DocTotal", CAST(T0."PaidToDate" AS DOUBLE) AS "PaidToDate", CAST((T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) AS DOUBLE) AS "BalanceDue" FROM OINV T0 WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND T0."DocDueDate" < CURRENT_DATE AND (T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) > 0 ORDER BY T0."DocDueDate" ASC LIMIT 50

question: find customers with more than five unpaid invoices older than 60 days
intent: customers with multiple aged unpaid AR invoices
business_context: collections risk can be found by grouping old open unpaid AR invoices by customer
embedding_text: customers more than five unpaid invoices older than sixty days aged receivables collection risk
sql: SELECT T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", COUNT(*) AS "unpaid_invoice_count", CAST(SUM(T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) AS DOUBLE) AS "total_balance_due", MIN(T0."DocDueDate") AS "oldest_due_date" FROM OINV T0 WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DocDueDate", CURRENT_DATE) > 60 AND (T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) > 0 GROUP BY T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY "total_balance_due" DESC LIMIT 50

question: list AR invoices where billing amount differs from sales order amount
intent: AR invoice versus sales order value variance
business_context: invoice lines copied from sales orders carry INV1 BaseType 17, BaseEntry, and BaseLine; compare invoice line value to source sales order line value
embedding_text: ar invoice billing amount differs from sales order amount discount tax freight variance invoice versus order value mismatch
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum" AS "invoice_number", T3."DocNum" AS "sales_order_number", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", CAST(SUM(T1."LineTotal") AS DOUBLE) AS "invoice_line_total", CAST(SUM(T2."LineTotal") AS DOUBLE) AS "sales_order_line_total", CAST(SUM(T1."LineTotal") - SUM(T2."LineTotal") AS DOUBLE) AS "variance_amount", CAST(((SUM(T1."LineTotal") - SUM(T2."LineTotal")) / NULLIF(SUM(T2."LineTotal"), 0)) * 100 AS DOUBLE) AS "variance_percent" FROM OINV T0 JOIN INV1 T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" JOIN RDR1 T2 ON T2."DocEntry" = T1."BaseEntry" AND T2."LineNum" = T1."BaseLine" JOIN ORDR T3 ON T3."DocEntry" = T2."DocEntry" WHERE T1."BaseType" = 17 AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."DocNum", T3."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" HAVING ABS(SUM(T1."LineTotal") - SUM(T2."LineTotal")) > 0 ORDER BY ABS("variance_amount") DESC LIMIT 50

question: show AR invoice aging by customer
intent: AR invoice aging buckets by customer
business_context: receivables aging groups open unpaid AR invoice balances into due-date buckets by customer
embedding_text: ar invoice aging customer receivable outstanding balance buckets current 1 30 31 60 61 90 over 90 days overdue
sql: SELECT T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T0."DocDueDate" >= CURRENT_DATE THEN (T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) AS "current_amount", CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T0."DocDueDate" < CURRENT_DATE AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DocDueDate", CURRENT_DATE) BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN (T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) AS "days_1_30", CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DocDueDate", CURRENT_DATE) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN (T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) AS "days_31_60", CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DocDueDate", CURRENT_DATE) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN (T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) AS "days_61_90", CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DocDueDate", CURRENT_DATE) > 90 THEN (T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) AS "days_over_90" FROM OINV T0 WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND (T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) > 0 GROUP BY T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" ORDER BY "days_over_90" DESC, "days_61_90" DESC LIMIT 50

question: show partially paid AR invoices
business_context: partially paid customer invoices have PaidToDate greater than zero but less than DocTotal
embedding_text: partially paid ar invoices customer invoice payment received balance pending collection
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDueDate", CAST(T0."DocTotal" AS DOUBLE) AS "DocTotal", CAST(T0."PaidToDate" AS DOUBLE) AS "PaidToDate", CAST((T0."DocTotal" - IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0)) AS DOUBLE) AS "BalanceDue" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(T0."PaidToDate", 0) < T0."DocTotal" ORDER BY T0."DocDueDate" ASC LIMIT 50

question: find AR invoice tax code mismatches against sales order lines
intent: AR invoice versus sales order tax code mismatch
business_context: compare tax code on AR invoice lines with tax code on the source sales order line
embedding_text: tax code mismatch ar invoice sales order invoice tax code differs sales order tax code billing tax variance
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum" AS "invoice_number", T3."DocNum" AS "sales_order_number", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T1."LineNum" AS "invoice_line", T1."ItemCode", T1."TaxCode" AS "invoice_tax_code", T2."TaxCode" AS "sales_order_tax_code" FROM OINV T0 JOIN INV1 T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" JOIN RDR1 T2 ON T2."DocEntry" = T1."BaseEntry" AND T2."LineNum" = T1."BaseLine" JOIN ORDR T3 ON T3."DocEntry" = T2."DocEntry" WHERE T1."BaseType" = 17 AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND IFNULL(T1."TaxCode", '') <> IFNULL(T2."TaxCode", '') ORDER BY T0."DocDate" DESC LIMIT 50
